# Action Document Template

Use this template when creating documentation for GitHub Actions. Ensure every required section is filled.

---

## Purpose
[Explain why this workflow exists and what problem it solves.]

## Triggers
[List the events that run this workflow (push, PR, schedule, workflow_call).]

## Checks Performed
[Describe the commands, scripts, or validations executed.]

## Failure Conditions
[Specify exactly what causes a failure.]

## Outputs / Artifacts
[List any artifacts, reports, or PR comments produced.]

## Integration Points
[Note dependencies on other workflows, scripts, or directories.]

## Recovery Steps
[Provide clear steps to fix failures.]

## Related Documents
- [Link to Constitution sections, policies, or guides.]

---

### Tips
- Keep sections concise but complete.
- Use bullet points for lists.
- Reference other docs with markdown links.
- Update the template if new sections become required.
